title: Blocket League Utils
description: QoL mod for Sethbling's Blocket League datapack (Ball Cam & Remove front 3rd person)
body:
# Blocket League Utils

## What is Blocket League

Blocket League is a gamemode created by [Sethbling](https://www.youtube.com/@SethBling), adapted from [Rocket League](https://www.rocketleague.com) (Psyonix).

The gamemode aims to showcase the insane Realistic Physic Engine that Sethbling created.

Videos: 
- [I Added Realistic Physics to Minecraft](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DhCBCudKJTs)
- [Rocket League in Minecraft](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xJLhCch08-M)
- [How I added Spheres to Minecraft Rocket League](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ahwWpMHqi6w)

## What is this mod doing

This mod is a client-side mod that adds some Quality of Life (QoL) improvements to mimic better the actual working of Rocket League.

**The mod offers** :
- Adding a "Ball Cam" (player's camera view is locked on ball)
- Adding an on-ground marker under the ball (to keep track of its position when on-air)
- Removing the 3rd person front view (cycling between 1st person & 3rd person)
- More to come...

This mods requires [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) in order to tweak some configuration, and [Modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is recommended to access the configuration ingame.
